name: The Not Exactly Nieman-Marcus Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Process oatmeal in blender or food processor until oatmeal turns into a fine powder. Set aside.
3. Cream the butter with both sugars. Add eggs, one at a time, then vanilla. Add flour, salt, baking powder, baking soda, and oatmeal. Stir in chocolate chips, grated Hershey Bar, and nuts.
4. Roll into balls and place 2 inches apart on a cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 10 minutes.
